saveframes.name: sample_1
tags:
PACAP27 binded to DMPC bilayers that were used as membranes. 
The liposome with peptide was once dried and then hydorolyzed under 32% relative
humidity.

saveframes.name: spectrometer_1
tags:
Static magnetic field was 11.74 T. 
Broadband double and triple resonance MAS probes for the sample rotors with 3.2 
and 4 mm diameters were used.
